Oh and I don’t know if you saw I forwarded you the business documents
On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:46 AM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
wrote:

> Yes that is in the form 1099 that I sent you
>
> On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:43 AM Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>
> wrote:
>
>> Hello,
>>
>>
>>
>> I understand what you’re doing and it sounds like it is great work, but I
>> need to know about the income portion, not the work itself.
>>
>>
>>
>> You said you pull from the business for money and get about $900 a month
>> and you also pull additional money for an apprentice, and he gets about
>> minimum wage, so there is money changing hands. I need the information just
>> about the money you regularly pull from the business for yourself and your
>> living expenses.
>>
>>
>>
>> *Ashley Glass *
>>
>> Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
>>
>> 503-802-8315
>>
>> [image: Logo Description automatically generated]
>>
>>
>>

>> documents from the participant portal at

>>

>> and 1:00PM - 3:00PM at 135 SW Ash Street
